title: Doug Liman on 'The Wall' and Making Movies His Way | The Big Picture (Ep. 13)
format: Sean Fennessey talks to director Doug Liman about 'The Wall,' his habit of reshooting endings, and stealing shots on 'The Bourne Identity.' BuzzFeed critic Alison Willmore sets up his filmography first.

films.title: The Wall
films.note: The new one: a static, near-three-hander war film Willmore calls an inverted 'Bourne Identity,' built on downtime and the tension of deciding when to act.

films.title: Swingers
films.note: The L.A. movie that put Jon Favreau in motion.

films.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
films.note: A marriage read into what's on screen; the pair note its newfound resonance.

films.title: Edge of Tomorrow
films.note: The Tom Cruise sci-fi film critics loved more than audiences turned out for.

films.title: Billy Lynn's Long Halftime Walk
films.note: Cited as another sideways entrance into a present-day war movie.

films.title: American Sniper
films.note: Held up as the more black-and-white take, though it still shows war chipping away at a soldier.

films.title: The Bourne Identity
films.note: The reference point for how Liman puts you in the car with the character.

films.title: American Made
films.note: The next Liman/Cruise film, then months out; a drug-war story with Caleb Landry Jones.

films.title: The Wall
films.note: A blacklist script by contest-winner Dwayne, with a villain drawn from the lore of Iraqi sniper Juba. Liman reshot the ending six months later after a friend's screening note, and paid Amazon for the change himself.

films.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
films.note: A reaction to 'Bourne': maybe it's easy to be an action hero and harder to keep a marriage, so we're celebrating the wrong guy.

films.title: Edge of Tomorrow
films.note: Its ending was manufactured in the edit: Cruise laughing at Liman off-camera. They reshot it properly with Emily Blunt but kept the original take.

films.title: The Bourne Identity
films.note: The shaky handheld look came from Liman and Matt Damon stealing shots on weekends to dodge a studio telling them what they couldn't do.

films.title: Swingers
films.note: Sneaking cameras onto a golf course in mountaineering packs; the ending was fixed with Favreau two weeks before shooting.
